ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., Rear-Wheel Drive, Front-Wheel Drive) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual 5-spd, Automatic 3-spd) */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Description of the engine */,
  "city_mpg" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "combined_mpg" INTEGER /* Combined miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "highway_mpg" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "fuel_cost_08" INTEGER /* Annual fuel cost (in dollars) based on 2008 data */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the vehicle (in miles) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Type of vehicle body (e.g., sedan, SUV, coupe) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Engine horsepower */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Engine torque */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard compliance (e.g., Euro 6, LEV III) */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity in kWh for electric vehicles */,
  "electric_range" INTEGER /* Range in miles for electric vehicles */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_description FOREIGN KEY ("engine_description") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission FOREIGN KEY ("transmission") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive_type FOREIGN KEY ("drive_type") REFERENCES drive_types ("drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the current CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle model was introduced */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  "class" TEXT /* Vehicle class (e.g., compact, mid-size, luxury) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Vehicle platform or chassis code */,
  "production_start" TEXT /* Start date of production for the model */,
  "production_end" TEXT /* End date of production for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Description of the engine */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual 5-spd, Automatic 3-spd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_types" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive type */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., Rear-Wheel Drive, Front-Wheel Drive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the drive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel cost entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_cost_08" INTEGER /* Annual fuel cost (in dollars) based on 2008 data */,
  "fuel_price_per_gallon" REAL /* Average fuel price per gallon for the year */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Annual mileage assumption for cost calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_costs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, marketing) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
